arts.ttl: Palmer at risk as Chelsea join race for Argentina wonderkid LOVED by Messi
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly joined the race to sign Como wonderkid Nico Paz ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window. Palmer at risk as Chelsea join race for Argentina wonderkid LOVED by Messi

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Tottenham want 13-G/A youngster with a “lot of quality”, highly-rated by Messi
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Argentine attacking midfielder Nico Paz at the end of the season. The 20-year-old midfielder plays for Como, and he has been outstanding for them since joining the club last summer. The player has six goals and seven assists to his name in the league this season. arts.ttl: Alan Shearer shares damning Chelsea verdict in brutal Enzo Maresca claim
arts.sum: Premier League icon Alan Shearer has delivered a scathing assessment of Chelsea, describing Enzo Maresca's side as a 'tough watch'. Pressure is building on the Italian despite the Blues competing for European qualification and into the UEFA Conference League semi-final.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Chelsea: Premier League — LIVE

arts.ttl: Fulham vs. Chelsea team news: Has Enzo Maresca reacted to Legia Warsaw defeat?

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues pursue €70m deal after Enzo Maresca warning
arts.sum: Guirassy has scored 28 goals in 40 appearances so far this season, including 13 in the Champions League, and he has reportedly been identified as a “star signing” by the Chelsea hierarchy. Chelsea’s interest in Guirassy comes after Maresca fired a brutal warning at Nicolas Jackson amid his current goal drought.

arts.ttl: Report: One of Enzo Maresca's favourite Chelsea youngsters hasn't signed his new contract
arts.sum: One of two are likely to go...

arts.ttl: How top sides feel about hiring Enzo Maresca if Chelsea sack manager after poor 2025 at Stamford Bridge - journalist
Enzo Maresca reveals truth behind Jadon Sancho transfer warning
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca reveals his message to Jadon Sancho before his upturn in form for Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Chelsea in DANGER as Bayern Munich pursue 'world class' star
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reportedly “seriously” interested in signing Chelsea midfielder Andrey Santos amid concerns over his long-term future at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca is set to give Santos a chance to impress him during the upcoming Club World Cup, although the Italian has admitted that no decision has been made on his long-term future at Stamford Bridge.
